violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Cutting board in BOH kitchen area has burn markings and pocking. Refrigerator door shelving has been "repaired" with packing and duct tape.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Soda dispensing equipment has a build up of syrup and needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Self service counter has liquid spill under equipment and needs cleaning. Prep table in kitchen area has food debris build up and needs cleaning.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand sink at self service counter not provided with soap.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have debris build up under equipment and shelving units. Needs cleaning. Syrup on floor under soda dispensing equipment in kitchen area. Needs cleaning. Vent cover to HVAC ductwork in kitchen area needs cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth bucket chemical sanitizer not maintained at proper concentrations.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Condiments cold hold unit at customer service counter has products temping at 50-54 degrees F.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Prep tables, utility carts, Alto Sham cart, and customer service counters need cleaning.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Chemical sanitizer dispenser at 3 compartment sink used for ware washing and wiping cloth bucket sanitizer has empty chemical bag.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not used on a regular basis to ensure proper sanitizing concentrations are maintained at 3 compartment sink and wiping cloth buckets.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Soaking cappuccino nozzles in tepid water instead of sanitizer water.--Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. "Clean" cappuccino nozzles stored in container under/next to hand sink and wash compartment of 3 tub sink. Protect items from splash contamination.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Back siphon valve at utility sink faucet damaged. Needs repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have an accumulation of dirt, food, & debris. Needs cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. 30"x30" prep table placed under chemical storage shelf next to mop/utility sink. Store chemicals below/away from work surfaces.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
